resources.string: WordWise monitors your text input and fixes grammar when you use the ?fix command. Your text is processed privately using your own API key.
Find and enable WordWise in the list
WordWise is ready! Type ?fix at the end of your text.
Add your Gemini API key in WordWise first
No corrections needed — text looks good
Could not replace text in this field. Try a standard text input field.
Large text detected — this may use more of your free quota
